title: New farmer training sessions
description: We are opening additional training sessions focused on sustainable farming and quality control.

title: Growing export partnerships
description: New market connections are helping cooperatives access wider opportunities across regions. BULMUCOS is open to any potential investors both local and foreign with whom it can work to improve agro input access to the members and also widen market for the produce.

title: Community support initiatives
description: Support programs continue to strengthen local livelihoods and long-term resilience.
